privileged_info_summary: The create_activity_type task requires an agent to enable Developer Mode in Odoo 17 CRM and create a new Activity Type named 'Product Demo' with specific attributes. All metadata values have been verified against the task description: the activity name is 'Product Demo', the default summary is 'Scheduled product demonstration', the default note includes 'Please prepare the demo environment and confirm attendee list before the session', the planned delay is 3 days, and the constrained model is 'crm.lead' (Lead/Opportunity). The underlying data is synthetic (created by the agent during task execution) rather than sourced from an external dataset. The Odoo 17.0 mail.activity.type model supports all required fields: name, summary, default_note, delay_count, and res_model_id.
